data.text: THIS THIN-ATMOSPHERE MOON OF ORANGE SODA SHAKE ON EKA29 IS SO
DARK THAT IT IS PRACTICALLY INVISIBLE.. SAVE FOR ITS OUTLINE.
IF YOU LOOK CLOSELY YOU CAN JUST ABOUT SEE A MOST CURIOUS FEATURE:
A PERFECT SQUARE, VISIBLE FROM SPACE, CENTERED ON 307:065. ID LOVE
TO GET A GOOD LOOK AT IT FROM THE SURFACE, BUT IT'S UNREASONABLY
DARK DOWN THERE ON THE NIGHT SIDE! I CAN BARELY SEE MY PAWS IN
FRONT OF MY FACE, MUCH LESS THE LANDSCAPE I'M ATTEMPTING TO SURVEY
